cases.title: Private Medical Clinic
cases.description: AI WhatsApp receptionist for a gastroenterology practice in Mexico City. Patients book, cancel, and pay — entirely through WhatsApp in natural Mexican Spanish. Zero receptionist overhead.
cases.quote: Patients book at 2am. Payments confirmed before they arrive. Our staff focuses on care, not phones.

cases.title: Loyalty Programs Company
cases.description: Full operational transformation for a 20-year company serving major banks. Replaced every manual Excel process with AI-powered automation. From zero dashboards to complete operational visibility.
cases.quote: 12 weeks from manual chaos to fully automated operations. Every process proves 95% precision before replacing the human.

cases.title: Premium Spirits Brand
cases.description: AI analytics platform for a mezcal brand across multiple US states. Stockout forecasting, lost revenue quantification, and supply chain optimization — turning distributor data into negotiation leverage.
cases.quote: Every shipment decision is now backed by data, not guesswork.

cases.title: A Family Office
cases.description: AI-powered operating system for a single-family office. Portfolio construction, trading execution, fiscal optimization, and fund tracking — infrastructure that automates every strategy end-to-end, replacing manual spreadsheet workflows.
cases.quote: Every rebalance, trade, and tax decision runs on schedule, without manual intervention.
